Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13212 0 0}Your power has grown, it seems. Theurgy, was it...? An impressive feat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}On the topic of such power, I must ask—are you familiar with the Major Arcana?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13207 0 0}To utilize metaphor, the Major Arcana are the parent plants which will help propagate your ever-growing garden of abilities.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}After defeating particularly strong Shadows, these Major Arcana will appear to you as cards.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}It would be in your best interest to collect these cards as you find them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13215 0 0}That aside... It seems that when you change, Tartarus changes as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}A number of strange doors have appeared within Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Where these doors lead, whether this bodes ill or well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even I do not have that knowledge.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, I believe you have the wherewithal to find out. Take the leap. You may discover something useful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Excellent. I have faith in you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Come now, there's little room for modesty in matters such as these.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13228 0 0}Those who challenge the unknown, choosing risk over comfort, often achieve greatness.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I believe such challenges necessarily facilitate some form of growth.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Your courage will lead to your betterment, {f 4 2}. I sincerely hope you will continue to act on it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Something weird's going on in Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}These doors... Should I go investigate?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 0 0}I must congratulate you on your recent victory. Your power continues to grow, it seems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}On the topic of such power, I must ask—are you familiar with the Major Arcana?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Major Arcana...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That'll be a useful resource going forward...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13217 0 0}While awaiting your arrival, I sensed something shifting within Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}A number of strange doors have appeared there, it seems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Where these doors lead, whether this bodes ill or well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even I do not have that knowledge.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, I believe you have the wherewithal to find out. Take the leap. You may discover something useful.[n]{f 1 1}
